Visualize Leading-Edge Genes from GSEA Results

VisualizeLeadingEdge.Rd

Loads one or more GSEA result CSV files (from RunGSEA or RunGSEA_pseudobulk), searches for pathways by keyword or exact name, extracts the union of leading-edge genes, and produces a per-cell expression heatmap. Optionally, if a DEG data frame is supplied, the leading-edge genes are intersected with significant DEGs and additional diagnostic plots are produced (a second heatmap, dotplot, stacked violins, and boxplots).

Usage

VisualizeLeadingEdge(
  seurat_object,
  gsea_files,
  search_terms = NULL,
  pathways = NULL,
  group.by,
  split.by = NULL,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  min_expr = 0.05,
  subset_cells = FALSE,
  subset_by = NULL,
  subset_values = NULL,
  deg_df = NULL,
  deg_gene_column = "feature",
  deg_group_column = "group",
  deg_fc_column = "logFC",
  deg_padj_column = "padj",
  deg_padj_cutoff = 0.05,
  deg_top_n = 20,
  add_dotplot = TRUE,
  add_violin = TRUE,
  add_boxplots = TRUE,
  add_pvalues = TRUE,
  add_feature_maps = FALSE,
  heatmap_type = c("cell", "group"),
  heatmap_column_split = NULL,
  show_pathway_annotation = TRUE,
  group_colors = NULL,
  split_colors = NULL,
  heatmap_params = list(row_names_side = "left", show_row_dend = FALSE,
    row_names_max_width = grid::unit(15, "cm")),
  output_dir,
  object_name = "Analysis",
  subset_name = ""
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object.

gsea_files

Character vector of CSV file paths (output of RunGSEA or RunGSEA_pseudobulk). Must each contain pathway and leadingEdge columns.

search_terms

Keyword(s) to filter pathways. See Pathway search above.

pathways

Exact pathway names to select (alternative to search_terms).

group.by

Metadata column for the primary grouping (required). Used for column annotation, dotplot, and violin grouping.

split.by

Optional second metadata column for column annotation and violin splitting.

assay

Assay to pull expression from (default "RNA").

layer

Layer to pull expression from (default "data").

min_expr

Genes whose row-mean expression is below this threshold are excluded from the heatmap (default 0.05).

subset_cells

Logical; if TRUE, subset seurat_object to subset_values in subset_by before analysis.

subset_by

Metadata column used for subsetting (requires subset_cells = TRUE).

subset_values

Character vector of values to retain in subset_by.

deg_df

Optional DEG data frame (e.g. from presto or FindMarkers). When provided, leading-edge genes are intersected with significant DEGs and additional plots are generated.

deg_gene_column

Column in deg_df with gene names (default "feature").

deg_group_column

Column in deg_df with group labels (default "group").

deg_fc_column

Column in deg_df with log-fold change (default "logFC").

deg_padj_column

Column in deg_df with adjusted p-value (default "padj").

deg_padj_cutoff

Adjusted p-value cut-off (default 0.05).

deg_top_n

Top N DEGs per group (by logFC) for bonus plots (default 20).

add_dotplot

Logical; produce a Seurat::DotPlot of top DEGs (default TRUE; requires deg_df).

add_violin

Logical; produce stacked violin plots of top DEGs (default TRUE; requires deg_df).

add_boxplots

Logical; produce boxplots of top DEGs (default TRUE; requires deg_df).

add_pvalues

Logical; overlay Kruskal-Wallis p-value on boxplots via ggpubr::stat_compare_means (default TRUE).

add_feature_maps

Logical; produce per-gene FeaturePlot PDFs for the top DEG genes (default FALSE; can be slow for large gene sets).

heatmap_type

Character. Either "cell" (default) for a per-cell heatmap with cells ordered by group.by (then split.by), or "group" for a compact group-mean heatmap with one column per group.by x split.by combination.

heatmap_column_split

Character or NULL. Metadata column used to split heatmap columns into labelled sections (e.g. a diagnosis or timepoint variable). Only applies when heatmap_type = "cell". Default NULL.

show_pathway_annotation

Logical. When TRUE (default), a colored annotation bar is drawn on the right of each heatmap showing which source pathway each gene belongs to. Suppressed automatically when only one pathway is matched.

group_colors

Named character vector of colors for group.by levels. Auto-assigned from Nour_pal("all") if NULL.

split_colors

Named character vector of colors for split.by levels. Auto-assigned from Nour_pal("spectrum") if NULL.

heatmap_params

Named list of additional arguments forwarded to ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(). Any key supplied here overrides the default.

output_dir

Directory where all output files are saved.

object_name

Label used in output file names and subfolder (default "Analysis").

subset_name

Optional label appended to output file names (default "").

Value

Invisibly returns a named list:

genes_all

All leading-edge genes present in the Seurat object (after min_expr filtering).

genes_top

Top DEG genes within the leading edge, or NULL if no deg_df was provided.

top_degs

Filtered DEG data frame, or NULL.

Pathway search

search_terms as a character vector

OR logic - any term matches, case-insensitive.

search_terms as a list of character vectors

Each element is an AND-group (all terms must appear in the same pathway name); results are OR'd across elements.

pathways

Exact pathway names (alternative to search_terms).

See also

RunGSEA, RunGSEA_pseudobulk, StackedVlnPlot
